acceptance_targets: [CH12-004] Pass if, across the revised versions of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:37, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:61, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:85, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:119, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:165, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:193, no more than two sentences still rely on 'as if' and at least three of the current comparisons have been replaced by direct image or declarative pressure.

[CH12-005] Pass if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:43, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:83, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:85, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:137, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:165 replace at least three of the current negation pivots with distinct affirmative sentence shapes, and no single local cluster still repeats the same contrastive template more than once.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, across the revised versions of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:37, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:61, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:85, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:119, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:165, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:193, no more than two sentences still rely on 'as if' and at least three of the current comparisons have been replaced by direct image or declarative pressure.
findings.problem: The chapter leans too often on 'as if' comparison to carry perception. In accumulation, that repeated hinge starts to feel mechanical and keeps otherwise vivid images one layer away from direct statement.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the sentence shaping at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:37, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:61, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:85, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:119, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:165, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:193 so most of those perceptions land as direct sensory fact or fresh metaphor rather than another 'as if' turn. Keep only the one or two comparisons that do irreplaceable work.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:43, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:83, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:85, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:137, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:165 replace at least three of the current negation pivots with distinct affirmative sentence shapes, and no single local cluster still repeats the same contrastive template more than once.
findings.problem: The prose repeatedly reaches for negation-driven contrast ('not X but Y', 'not X, not Y', 'did not mean') to create emphasis. Used this often in one chapter, the move turns from chosen rhythm into a recognizable formula.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:43, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:83, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:85, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:137, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_12.md:165 so at least several of those emphases are rendered in affirmative syntax or a different rhythmic pattern instead of another negated contrast.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the contradiction that tenderness can coexist with surveillance, desire with betrayal, and ideology with vanity. Render violence, sex, illness, and poverty at the scale characters actually experience them. When an edge case appears, choose the more specific and less reputationally safe version if it remains faithful to character, period, and causality.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches bodily danger, sex, grief, class shame, or political cruelty and then retreats into summary, rewrite toward the exact physical and social fact the character cannot evade.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: Moderate to high; contractions are the spoken default, with full forms reserved for period formality, deliberate emphasis, or Vautrin's cultivated precision.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressive surveillance chapters with slower communal or reflective chapters; vary scene count, dialogue density, and whether the turn comes from action, information, dread, or aftermath so no two adjacent chapters run on the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Historically grounded and unsentimental; plain enough for labor and bureaucracy, lyrical only when perception earns it rather than rhetoric.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third centered on Elise, elastic enough to register class texture, political pressure, and the quarry's collective life without drifting into authorial essay.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, image-bearing sentences broken by hard factual beats at moments of violence, lust, bureaucratic coercion, or shame.
